test_cases.title: User is authenticated and redirected to dashboard with valid credentials
preconditions: User is not currently logged in
steps: Enter a valid registered email address
test_cases.expected_result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to their personal dashboard

test_cases.title: Session token is created on successful login
preconditions: User is not currently logged in
steps: Inspect browser session or cookie storage
test_cases.expected_result: A session token is present in secure storage following successful authentication

notes: Covers the happy-path login flow including session creation. Both test cases share the same preconditions as the user must start unauthenticated.
